title: Collect and prepare standard samples
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and prepare standard samples demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for sample collection

pcs.text: Identify and confirm type of sample required prior to collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm type of sample required prior to collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm type of sample required prior to collection.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample.

pcs.text: Identify prescribed procedures to ensure representative sampling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify prescribed procedures to ensure representative sampling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify prescribed procedures to ensure representative sampling.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for sample collection

elements.title: Use aseptic techniques

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use specified personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use specified personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample transfer according to workplace health and safety standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample transfer according to workplace health and safety standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample transfer according to workplace health and safety standards.

pcs.text: Select equipment and materials specified for the procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and materials specified for the procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and materials specified for the procedure.

pcs.text: Ensure equipment is clean and sterilised to prevent contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure equipment is clean and sterilised to prevent contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure equipment is clean and sterilised to prevent contamination.

pcs.text: Organise equipment to minimise contamination during sample collection and preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise equipment to minimise contamination during sample collection and preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise equipment to minimise contamination during sample collection and preparation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Use aseptic techniques

elements.title: Perform sample collection

pcs.text: Collect samples according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Preserve sample integrity throughout all aspects of sampling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve sample integrity throughout all aspects of sampling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve sample integrity throughout all aspects of sampling.

pcs.text: Place samples in suitable containers, and label to clearly identify sample type, location, date and any other workplace-specific information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place samples in suitable containers, and label to clearly identify sample type, location, date and any other workplace-specific information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place samples in suitable containers, and label to clearly identify sample type, location, date and any other workplace-specific information.

pcs.text: Recognise and report unusual or non-standard observations made during sampling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report unusual or non-standard observations made during sampling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report unusual or non-standard observations made during sampling.

pcs.text: Maintain sampling equipment in clean, safe and sterile working order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain sampling equipment in clean, safe and sterile working order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain sampling equipment in clean, safe and sterile working order.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Perform sample collection

elements.title: Handle, store and dispatch samples

pcs.text: Record sample information according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record sample information according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record sample information according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Where laboratories are used, store and preserve sample, and check sample label is clear and according to laboratory procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Where laboratories are used, store and preserve sample, and check sample label is clear and according to laboratory procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Where laboratories are used, store and preserve sample, and check sample label is clear and according to laboratory procedures.

pcs.text: Dispatch sample, and store and preserve samples requiring analysis by external laboratories according to laboratory procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispatch sample, and store and preserve samples requiring analysis by external laboratories according to laboratory procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispatch sample, and store and preserve samples requiring analysis by external laboratories according to laboratory procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of unwanted samples according to workplace and hygiene standards

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of unwanted samples according to workplace and hygiene standards.
